case_title: BRIAN CHAN VS. FERNANDO FAROL ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAROL, FERNANDO DBA FAROL RESIDENTIAL CARE HOME FAROL, FERNANDO DBA QUALITY CARE SERVICES FAROL, LORNA DBA RESIDENTIAL CARE HOME FAROL, LORNA DBA QUALITY CARE SERVICES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 479 EUCALYPTUS DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132 $3,786.41 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,786.41, LEASE FORFEITED, SUBJECT TO ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 6/28/17. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
